character_constraint.physical_trait: Right eye covered by bangs throughout entire scene
character_constraint.accessory: Small light-green hair clip on bangs, visible in every shot
character_constraint.body_type: Curvy body type - hard constraint per model sheet
character_constraint.reference: Model sheet for Swordmaster must be applied
Model sheet for Lancer must be applied

global_constraints.scene_constraint: Reference image serves as initial frame for continuity
global_constraints.continuity_constraint: All three segments form continuous narrative flow

segment.narration: SWORDMASTER takes a slow sip of tea, then sets the cup down. She reveals Rogue's impending arrival at the monastery with Taoist philosophical weight.

setting.props: Tea cup, low table, traditional seating

camera_direction.framing: SWORDMASTER centered, bangs and hair clip prominent
camera_direction.movement: Slow tilt down following cup movement, then return to face
camera_direction.focus: Sharp focus on face and hair clip, cup slightly soft
camera_direction.composition: Vertical symmetry, hair clip at golden ratio point

lighting.key_light: Soft window light from camera left

pacing.beat: Sip of tea, set down, then dialogue with gravitas

dialogue.speaker: SWORDMASTER
dialogue.line: Rogue is coming to the monastery. We're going to meet him. Ignoring him isn't an option. And as Taoists... we value champions who can do things that are meta-real.
dialogue.action: Slow sip of tea, sets cup down, bangs cover right eye throughout

continuity.exit_state: Scene conclusion, leads to next sequence
continuity.visual_markers: Hair clip visible in final frame, right eye remains covered
